CreateTask.name: Transfer task name
CreateTask.hosts: List of hosts to run the task
CreateTask.tags: List of tags to create, see below for parameter format
CreateTask.tags.tagKey: Tag key, may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1-65
CreateTask.tags.tagValue: Tag value, may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0-65
